visual_beats: Close-up on InVideo AI twin's face, looking directly at the camera.
Screen recording of ChatGPT interface, showing a conversation thread.
Split screen: one side shows the free ChatGPT interface, the other shows the Plus interface with a 'GPT-4' label.
B-roll of someone typing rapidly on a keyboard, looking slightly stressed.
Graphic showing the $20/month price point for ChatGPT Plus.
InVideo AI twin speaking directly to camera, shrugging slightly.
Final shot of the InVideo AI twin looking thoughtful, then a quick, subtle glitch effect over their face before cutting to black.
